schema_article.headline: Kanakapura Site Dimensions & Pricing: 30x40 Site Cost, 2000 Sq Ft Land Prices
schema_article.description: Complete guide to 30x40 site costs in Kanakapura, including 2000 sq ft land pricing, 1 acre costs, and Metro Phase 2 impact on property values.
schema_article.articleBody: Looking for land in Kanakapura? 30x40 sites currently range from ₹45-65 lakhs in interior layouts to ₹65-75 lakhs in BBMP-approved sectors (Q4 2025). This represents a 12-15% YoY increase driven by Metro Phase 2 planning.
schema_article.keywords: 30x40 site cost Bangalore, 2000 square feet land price, Kanakapura land pricing

mainEntity.name: What is the current cost of a 30x40 site in Kanakapura?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 30x40 site in Kanakapura currently costs ₹45-65 lakhs in interior layouts and ₹65-75 lakhs in BBMP-approved sectors as of Q4 2025. Properties within 2km of Kanakapura Road command a 15-20% premium over interior layouts.

mainEntity.name: How much does a 2000 sq ft plot cost in Kanakapura?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 2000 sq ft (approximately 40x50) plot in Kanakapura ranges from ₹90-115 lakhs depending on location and BBMP approval status. This represents a significant investment compared to smaller 1200 sq ft plots but offers greater construction flexibility.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of 1 acre land in Kanakapura Road?

acceptedAnswer.text: One acre of land in Kanakapura Road area costs approximately ₹3.5-4.5 crores depending on proximity to main roads and infrastructure connectivity. Plots closer to Kanakapura Road command premium pricing due to better accessibility.

mainEntity.name: How has Metro Phase 2 impacted Kanakapura land prices?

acceptedAnswer.text: Metro Phase 2 planning has driven a 12-15% YoY increase in land values. Larger plots (40x60) have appreciated 18-22% YoY due to Metro Phase 2 proximity, making them attractive for investors with longer holding periods.

mainEntity.name: Should I buy a 30x40 or 40x60 plot in Kanakapura?

acceptedAnswer.text: 30x40 sites (₹45-75L) suit first-time buyers with limited budgets and standard construction needs. 40x60 plots (₹95-130L) are better for investors seeking higher appreciation potential and greater construction flexibility, with 18-22% YoY appreciation.
